$comment: PoC #09 Day 1 — nestjs-realworld BR 추출. ~7 BR (Modern + small / vs PoC #08 8 BR isomorphic).

business_rules.title: User 등록 시 username + email uniqueness 검증
business_rules.natural_language: UserService.create — createQueryBuilder 로 (user.username = :username OR user.email = :email) 검증 후 매칭 시 HttpException(BAD_REQUEST). TypeORM dynamic SQL paradigm corroboration 핵심.

business_rules.title: password = argon2 해시 ( vs PoC #08 평문 → 본 PoC 정상 보안)
business_rules.natural_language: UserService.findOne (login) — argon2.verify(user.password, password) 호출. password 저장 시 argon2 해시. vs PoC #08 jpetstore 평문 password 정합 (BR-PETSTORE-006 / AP-PETSTORE-004) — Modern Node.js stack = 보안 정상.
business_rules.isomorphic_to_poc08: inverse — PoC #08 = 평문 (bug) / PoC #09 = argon2 (intent / 정상) / paradigm-cross AP 일반화 입증 ↑

business_rules.title: Article findAll = 4 동적 분기 (tag / author / favorited / 기본 1=1)
business_rules.natural_language: ArticleService.findAll(query) — createQueryBuilder + leftJoinAndSelect + .where('1 = 1') + 4 dynamic .andWhere (tag LIKE / authorId / favorited author / IN ids) + orderBy + getCount + limit/offset. TypeORM dynamic SQL paradigm = iBATIS `<isNotEmpty>` / `<if>` 와 isomorphic.

business_rules.title: Article findFeed = 사용자 follow IN ids 분기
business_rules.natural_language: ArticleService.findFeed(userId, query) — followsRepository.find({followerId}) → ids = follows.map → createQueryBuilder + where('article.authorId IN (:ids)') + orderBy + limit/offset. TypeORM IN clause paradigm.

business_rules.title: Article slug 자동 생성 (title 기반)
business_rules.natural_language: ArticleService.create — slug 패키지 사용 (title → URL-safe slug) + create. slug 추후 URL path 사용 (/:slug).

business_rules.title: Comment 추가 = Article cascade save
business_rules.natural_language: ArticleService.addComment — article.findOne + comment.save + article.comments.push + article.save. TypeORM cascade relation 활용.

business_rules.title: Profile follow = followsRepository unique check + save
business_rules.natural_language: ProfileService.follow — findOne(followerId + followingId) 으로 unique check 후 부재 시 save. self-follow 차단 (followerEmail === followingEmail).

summary.$comment_summary: Modern Node.js stack + 작은 codebase = BR 모두 intent (likely bug 0 / ambiguous 0). vs PoC #08 평문 password (1 critical bug) → argon2 해시 = 정상 보안. paradigm-cross MEDIUM #2 = 보안 정상 패턴 입증 (PoC #08 inverse).
